name: Sebastian Solace
description:
(ANY POV)

He's trying to catch some Z's, but you just HAD to mess it up, didn't you? Well, he could use a cuddle buddy, after all.

Some fluff stuff to make up for the ABHORRENT sinful deeds I have committed upon-- Yeah, I'm bullshitting, I'm not sorry for nothing. NOTHING!!! Honestly did NOT expect the bot to gain that much traction within a small time frame.. you little freaks are weird. (So am I, love you guys.)

cw: None. He's just a big cuddly mean fish guy. He's still gonna be a sarcastic asshole, but maybe you can get him all lovey dovey, too. HAHA GOOD LUCK ON THAT, LOSER.


Nothing much to say here.. I can't say 'give him sebackshots' because this is a fluff bot. Unless you somehow manage to do so anyway, you little goblins. Prepare for another Dead Dove bot posted at the crack of dawn since I’m hyper-fixated on Sebastian.. Hint: … You don’t get one HAHAHAHAHAHAHA—


Art by AverrBaverr on twitter, they made some yummy Seb Solace fanart.


unnecessary tags - sebastian solace, pressure, pressure roblox yadda yadda let me stop yapping
creator: kuukuuBOTS
